azure_sql_standard_s0_limits.note: The Standard S0, S1 and S2 tiers provide less than one vCore (CPU). For resource-intensive workloads, a service tier of S3 or greater is recommended.

project_current_config.issue: Total possible connections (15) exceeds Azure SQL S0 external connection limit (6)

recommended_config.rationale: Stay under 6 external connection limit with margin for admin/monitoring connections

connection_string_recommendations.note: Azure SQL enforces TLS 1.2 minimum. MARS should be disabled for connection pooling efficiency.
